description_long: This is a robust, double-bladed axe featuring a dark, intricately patterned metal head with two symmetrical cutting edges. The handle is made of wood, slightly curved for ergonomic grip, and is wrapped with dark leather straps for added comfort and control. The lower portion of the handle is further reinforced with a thick, dark band, likely for shock absorption and durability. The axe head is securely mounted to the handle with visible wrappings and a central metal pin. The metal blades have a matte, weathered finish with engraved geometric designs, giving the tool a rugged, utilitarian yet decorative appearance. This axe would be suitable for heavy-duty tasks or as a display piece in an urban garage or workshop.
description: A double-bladed, dark metal axe with a curved wooden handle wrapped in leather and decorative engravings on the blade.
description_view_0: The axe is shown at an angle, highlighting both blades, the engraved patterns, and the leather-wrapped handle.
description_view_1: A direct top-down view, showing the circular cross-section of the handle and the symmetry of the blade edges.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the axe, displaying the second blade and the full curvature of the handle with its wrappings.
description_view_3: A direct bottom-up view, focusing on the end of the handle and the alignment of the blade edges.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a round cross-section, wrapped in leather for grip, and reinforced at the base.
attribute_blade_design: Double-edged symmetrical blade with a broad, slightly curved cutting edge on each side, engraved with geometric patterns.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and wrapped mounting with visible leather straps and a central metal pin.
